title: carlina biebersteinii subsp. sudetica
intro: Carlina biebersteinii subsp. sudetica, also known as the Silesian carline thistle, is a plant species within the genus Carlina, belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Carlina biebersteinii subsp. sudetica are typically made from its roots, leaves, and flowers, often in the form of infusions, tinctures, or dried extracts.
